label: Battery Charging Calculator
info:
Calculates optimal battery charging strategy during the cheap/free rate period.
Polls sensors every 60s, joins data, runs calculation function, and writes results
to HA helper entities consumed by the Supplemental Grid Charging automation.

REPLACE the server node ID (58a17342.ac5f9c) with your own HA server node ID.
All entity IDs marked with YOUR_ prefix must be replaced with your own.

name: Calculate Charging Strategy
